title: stelis filiformis
intro: Stelis filiformis, also known as the whip-shaped orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis filiformis include its ability to help with fever reduction, relief from respiratory issues, and its potential to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stelis filiformis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to create pharmaceuticals with similar properties.
